descriptions.text: Yoshi in Sonic 2 is a ROMhack/mod of Sonic The Hedgehog 2. In this mod, the player controls Yoshi, with his signature moves from the Yoshi's Island series, like ground pounding, egg laying and throwing, enemy eating. Yoshi carries on his back a Baby Sonic and Tails, which will start to cry if Yoshi gets hurt, and the player loses a life if they are taken away.
